name: Tostada Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 deep dish pastry shell or, (9 inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Bake shell for 7 minutes.
3. Mix avocados, garlic, lemon juice, 1 chopped tomato, and 1 tablespoon ground chilies with hot pepper sauce. Cover and refrigerate.
4. Reduce oven temperature to 375 degrees.
5. Saute beef, onion, remaining ground chilies, and taco seasonings until drained.
6. Layer the cheese and beef mixture in the shell.
7. Combine eggs, half and half, salt, and pepper. Whisk until mixed.
8. Pour the egg mixture over the meat in the shell.
9. Bake for 45 minutes or until firm. Let stand for 10 minutes or refrigerate.
10. Top with the avocado mixture.
11. Serve with chips. Optional: bed of shredded lettuce and more chopped tomato.
